expectations.text: Output starts with '# 審查：denomination-claims.md' or similar header

expectations.evidence: All 10 checks present: ### 1 through ### 10, with ### 7 ✅ 通過, ### 9 ✅ 通過.

expectations.text: At least one check is marked N/A or 此檢查不適用 when inapplicable
expectations.evidence: No check explicitly marked N/A. Check 7 shows '✅ 通過' and Check 9 shows '✅ 通過'. The skill's format uses ✅ for clean checks, not N/A.

expectations.text: Output ends with a summary table
expectations.evidence: Summary table present with | 檢查 | 結果 | format listing all 10 checks.

expectations.text: Report does NOT auto-fix any content
expectations.evidence: All findings are reported only, no auto-fixes.

suggestions.assertion: At least one check is marked N/A or 此檢查不適用 when inapplicable
suggestions.reason: The skill uses '✅ 通過' for clean checks, not 'N/A'. The assertion should match the skill's actual output format. denomination-claims.md is a reference file so all 10 checks apply — N/A would only appear for non-reference content.

eval_feedback.overall: One assertion mismatches the skill's design. For reference files, all checks apply; N/A is only for URLs/pasted text on checks 6-10.
